## Instructions on generated code
- All Generated Code must me clean code & well modulraized. For Front-end, for example, reusable components, hooks, functions, services, etc.
- if possible in Front-end, rely more on ShadCN components and you can instruct me to install what's needed or install it automatically
- For Front-end, Styles should be also well modularized if possible according to Profissional Tailwind Use.
